description: Gangnam-focused POI registry for Seoul citydata collection and OSM-backed supplemental watch points. Citydata entries are official OA-21285 hotspot codes; supplemental entries are map/context points only.

official_reference.name: Seoul real-time citydata OA-21285 update notice

citydata_collection.name: 강남 MICE 관광특구
citydata_collection.note: COEX/MICE district proxy for Samsung-dong visitor pressure.

citydata_collection.name: 강남역
citydata_collection.note: High-volume station and commercial demand anchor.

citydata_collection.name: 선릉역
citydata_collection.note: Station and office-flow proxy around Seolleung.

citydata_collection.name: 신논현역·논현역
citydata_collection.note: Combined station hotspot for Nonhyeon/Gangnam north edge.

citydata_collection.name: 양재역
citydata_collection.actual_area_note: 서초구 서초/양재동 및 강남구 도곡동 경계권. 9개 target dong에 직접 귀속하지 않음.
citydata_collection.note: Excluded from live target-dong aggregation. Keep only as possible future adjacent-area context.

citydata_collection.name: 가로수길
citydata_collection.note: Sinsa/Garosu-gil retail and dining visitor proxy.

citydata_collection.name: 압구정로데오거리
citydata_collection.actual_area_note: 압구정/청담 경계 성격의 상권 POI. 신사동으로 단정 매핑하지 않음.
citydata_collection.note: Excluded from live target-dong aggregation until boundary mapping is made explicit.

citydata_collection.name: 청담동 명품거리
citydata_collection.note: Cheongdam retail visitor and road pressure proxy.

citydata_collection.name: 교대역
citydata_collection.actual_area_note: 서초구 서초동 권역. 강남구 대치4동에 귀속하지 않음.
citydata_collection.note: Excluded from live target-dong aggregation. Keep only as possible future adjacent-area context.

supplemental_watchlist.name: 학동역
supplemental_watchlist.note: No confirmed Seoul citydata hotspot code; keep as map/context POI.

supplemental_watchlist.name: 언주역
supplemental_watchlist.note: No confirmed Seoul citydata hotspot code; keep as map/context POI.

supplemental_watchlist.name: 강남구청역
supplemental_watchlist.note: No confirmed Seoul citydata hotspot code; keep as map/context POI.

supplemental_watchlist.name: 대치역
supplemental_watchlist.note: No confirmed Seoul citydata hotspot code; keep as map/context POI.

supplemental_watchlist.name: 한티역
supplemental_watchlist.note: No confirmed Seoul citydata hotspot code; keep as map/context POI.

supplemental_watchlist.name: 테헤란로
supplemental_watchlist.note: Corridor-level context POI. Use TOPIS/road graph rather than citydata hotspot population.
